topic: Experimental probability from frequency table, express as decimal
latex:
A spinner is divided into five colored sections that are not of equal size: red, blue, green, yellow, and purple. The spinner is spun several times, and the results are recorded below:

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Color} & \textbf{Frequency} \\
\hline
Red & 17 \\
\hline
Blue & 10 \\
\hline
Green & 15 \\
\hline
Yellow & 14 \\
\hline
Purple & 15 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

Based on these results, express the probability that the next spin will land on blue as a decimal to the nearest hundredth.
